steps.title: Use the industry contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts technology-firm clustering with tube-manufacturer clustering. The reasons for agglomeration are not the same across industries.

steps.title: Pick the varied meaning
steps.content: Choice A means believable, Choice C means urgently necessary, and Choice D means conclusive. None describes differences across industries. A word meaning varied or differing in kind fits the sentence. The answer is B.
